required_env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME
required_env_vars.description: Cal.com username for coach booking widget

tasks.name: Create CoachingSessionsCard component structure
tasks.purpose: Create the Card wrapper with header (title, description, icon) and footer (View Full Calendar link) for the coaching sessions widget

dependencies: Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter from @kit/ui/card
constraints: Must be a Server Component (no 'use client')
Use semantic color classes for dark mode support
CardContent height should be 350-400px for compact iframe

tasks.input_state: No CoachingSessionsCard component exists. Dashboard page is empty.
tasks.output_state: CoachingSessionsCard component exists with Card wrapper, header with CalendarDays icon and title/description using Trans, empty CardContent placeholder (no iframe yet), and CardFooter with 'View Full Calendar' link to /home/coaching
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component file exists with Card structure, Trans components for i18n, CalendarDays icon, and link to /home/coaching in footer
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && grep -q 'export.*CoachingSessionsCard' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && grep -q 'CalendarDays' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && grep -q 'CardFooter' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add Cal.com iframe with env var URL construction

action.target: iframe element with dynamic Cal.com URL

tasks.purpose: Insert iframe element into CardContent that constructs Cal.com URL from NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME and NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_EVENT_SLUG env vars

constraints: Set height to 350-400px for compact display

tasks.input_state: CoachingSessionsCard component exists with empty CardContent placeholder
tasks.output_state: CardContent contains iframe element that reads NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME and NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_EVENT_SLUG env vars and constructs Cal.com embed URL, with loading='lazy', appropriate height (350-400px), and accessibility attributes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: iframe element exists in CardContent with src constructed from env vars, loading='lazy' attribute, and compact height styling
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_COACH_USERNAME' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && grep -q 'NEXT_PUBLIC_CALCOM_EVENT_SLUG' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && grep -q 'loading.*lazy' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && grep -q 'iframe' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard/coaching-sessions-card.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Wire CoachingSessionsCard to dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Import and render CoachingSessionsCard component in the dashboard page (ready for grid layout integration by S2045.I1.F1)

constraints: Place component inside PageBody (grid layout will be added later by S2045.I1.F1)

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page imports only HomeLayoutPageHeader and PageBody. CoachingSessionsCard component is complete.
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page imports CoachingSessionsCard and renders it inside PageBody, making the coaching widget visible on /home route
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page.tsx imports CoachingSessionsCard and includes it in the JSX, component renders on /home route
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "import.*CoachingSessionsCard" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q "<CoachingSessionsCard" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add i18n translation keys for coaching card
tasks.purpose: Add internationalization keys for card title, description, and 'View Full Calendar' link text to support multi-language dashboard

constraints: Add keys under 'dashboard' namespace in common.json

tasks.input_state: CoachingSessionsCard uses Trans components but i18n keys don't exist yet. Component wired to dashboard page.
tasks.output_state: common.json contains dashboard.coachingCardTitle, dashboard.coachingCardDescription, and dashboard.viewFullCalendar keys with English translations
tasks.acceptance_criterion: common.json contains new dashboard coaching keys, strings match component usage, typecheck passes
tasks.verification_command: grep -q '"coachingCardTitle"' apps/web/public/locales/en/common.json && grep -q '"coachingCardDescription"' apps/web/public/locales/en/common.json && grep -q '"viewFullCalendar"' apps/web/public/locales/en/common.json && pnpm typecheck
